zh.lifeSummary: 當Vardry Magby II於大約1760年出生在美國南卡羅來納州時，他的父親Vardry McBee27歲，母親Hannah Echols28歲。他於大約1780年與Rachel Atkinson結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在美國阿拉巴馬州聖 克萊爾住了大約10年且於1840年住在美國阿拉巴馬州沃克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vardry Magby II于大约1760年出生在美国南卡罗来纳州时，他的父亲Vardry McBee27岁，母亲Hannah Echols28岁。他于大约1780年与Rachel Atkinson结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在美国亚拉巴马州聖 克萊爾住了大约10年且于1840年住在美国亚拉巴马州沃克。

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Sullivan's Island
historicEvents.description: On June 28, 1776, the Battle of Sullivan's Island takes place on Sullivan's Island, South Carolina. Since it is so close to Charelston, the battle is sometimes referred to as the First Siege of Charleston. This is the first time that the Americans had a victory against a land and sea attack by the British.
Bill of Rights guarantees individual freedom.

historicEvents.title: Head Tax Law
historicEvents.description: "In 1792, South Carolina passes a law called the ""head tax"" for all free African Americans from age 16-50. This tax was $2.00."
historicEvents.urlTitle: JSTOR- The Journal of Negro History

historicEvents.title: Financial Relief for Public Land
historicEvents.description: A United States law to provide financial relief for the purchasers of Public Lands. It permitted the earlier buyers, that couldn't pay completely for the land, to return the land back to the government. This granted them a credit towards the debt they had on land. Congress, also, extended credit to buyer for eight more years. Still while being in economic panic and the shortage of currency made by citizens, the government hoped that with the time extension, the economy would improve.

historicEvents.title: Slave Rebellion
historicEvents.description: "On June 16, 1822,  Denmark Vesey a free and self-educated African American leads a slave rebellion called ""the rising."" The interesting thing about this rebellion is that it does not really happen. The only thing the judges have to go on is the testimony of people that witness it."
In 1860, South Carolina quit the United States because its citizens were in favor of slavery and President Lincoln was not. The Civil War started a year later.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

en.lifeSummary: When Vardry Magby II was born about 1760, in South Carolina, United States, his father, Vardry McBee, was 27 and his mother, Hannah Echols, was 28. He married Rachel Atkinson about 1780. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in St. Clair, Alabama, United States for about 10 years and Walker, Alabama, United States in 1840.

fr.Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginia, Britis: Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vardry Magby II est né environ 1760, à Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, son père, Vardry McBee, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Hannah Echols, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Rachel Atkinson environ 1780. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à St. Clair, Alabama, États-Unis pendant environ 10 ans et à Walker, Alabama, États-Unis en 1840.

de.Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginia, Britis: Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Vardry Magby II um 1760 in South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vardry McBee 27 und seine Mutter Hannah Echols 28. Er hat um 1780 Rachel Atkinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat ungefähr 10 Jahre lang in St. Clair, Alabama, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt, und 1840 hat er in Walker, Alabama, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt.

Lui sposato Rachel Atkinson circa 1780. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a St. Clair, Alabama, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 10 anni e nel Walker, Alabama, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1840.

ja.lifeSummary: Vardry Magby IIが約1760年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州で生まれた時，父Vardry McBeeは27歳，母Hannah Echolsは28歳であった。約1780年にRachel Atkinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州スト. クレイルに約10年間，1840年にはアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州ウォーカーに住んでいた。

ko.Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginia, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 할이파스 앤트림 파리시
ko.Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 할이파스
ko.lifeSummary: Vardry Magby II(이)가 대략 1760년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vardry McBee(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Echols(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1780년 Rachel Atkinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 앨라배마 주 스트. 클레이르에서 약 10년, 1840년도에 미국 앨라배마 주 워커에서 살았다.

Ele casou-se com Rachel Atkinson aproximadamente 1780. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em St. Clair, Alabama, Estados Unidos da América por quase 10 anos e em Walker, Alabama, Estados Unidos da América em 1840.

ru.Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginia, Britis: антрим пэриш, хэлифакс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vardry Magby II родился около 1760 г. в местности Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Vardry McBee было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Echols, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Rachel Atkinson около 1780 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности ст. клеир, Алабама, Соединенные штаты около 10 лет и в местности валкир, Алабама, Соединенные штаты в 1840 году.
